seo.metaTitle: Managed WordPress Hosting — Fast, Secure & Expert Support | ICSDC
seo.metaDescription: ICSDC WordPress Hosting — one-click install, LiteSpeed servers, daily backups, and 24/7 WordPress expert support. Plans starting from ₹99/month.

api::wordpress-hosting-page.wordpress-ho.heroTitle: WordPress Hosting That Works as Hard as Your Content
api::wordpress-hosting-page.wordpress-ho.heroSubtitle: Fast, Secure, and Fully Managed WordPress — Ready in Minutes
api::wordpress-hosting-page.wordpress-ho.heroDescription: Launch your WordPress site with blazing speed, enterprise-grade security, and one-click installation. ICSDC handles updates, backups, and optimizations so you focus on creating content that matters.

pillars.title: One-Click Installation
pillars.desc: WordPress ready in minutes with no technical setup required — just install and start creating.

pillars.title: Blazing Fast Performance
pillars.desc: LiteSpeed servers with built-in caching and NVMe SSD storage optimized specifically for WordPress.

pillars.title: Daily Backups & Restore
pillars.desc: Automatic daily backups with one-click restore — your content is always safe and recoverable.

pillars.title: 24/7 WordPress Support
pillars.desc: Expert WordPress specialists available around the clock for technical guidance and troubleshooting.

api::wordpress-hosting-page.wordpress-ho.plansTitle: WordPress Hosting Plans for Every Need
api::wordpress-hosting-page.wordpress-ho.plansSubtitle: All plans include free SSL, one-click WordPress install, and 24/7 expert support.
api::wordpress-hosting-page.wordpress-ho.featuresTitle: Everything You Need for a High-Performing WordPress Site
api::wordpress-hosting-page.wordpress-ho.featuresSubtitle: Built-in tools and optimizations that make WordPress faster, safer, and easier to manage.

features.title: LiteSpeed Caching
features.desc: Built-in LiteSpeed cache for dramatically faster page loads and better Core Web Vitals scores.

features.title: Free SSL Certificate
features.desc: Free Let's Encrypt SSL with auto-renewal keeps your site secure and boosts search engine rankings.

features.title: Daily Automated Backups
features.desc: Automatic daily backups stored offsite with simple one-click restore for complete peace of mind.

features.title: Staging Environment
features.desc: Test themes, plugins, and updates on a staging clone before pushing changes to your live site.

features.title: CDN Integration
features.desc: Global content delivery network reduces latency and speeds up your site for visitors worldwide.

features.title: Malware Scanning
features.desc: Automated malware scanning and removal keeps your WordPress installation clean and secure.

ctaBand1.title: Start Your WordPress Journey Today
ctaBand1.description: One-click install, pre-optimized servers, and expert support included.

api::wordpress-hosting-page.wordpress-ho.performanceTitle: WordPress Performance That Keeps Visitors Engaged
api::wordpress-hosting-page.wordpress-ho.performanceSubtitle: Every component of ICSDC WordPress Hosting is optimized for speed.

performanceCards.title: NVMe SSD Storage
performanceCards.desc: Up to 10x faster than traditional HDDs — your database queries and file reads are blazingly fast.

performanceCards.title: LiteSpeed Web Server
performanceCards.desc: LiteSpeed handles WordPress traffic 84x faster than Apache in benchmark tests.

performanceCards.title: Built-in Object Caching
performanceCards.desc: Redis/Memcached object caching reduces database queries and dramatically improves response times.

performanceCards.title: Free CDN Included
performanceCards.desc: Global CDN with 200+ PoPs ensures fast load times for visitors regardless of their location.

performanceCards.title: HTTP/3 & QUIC Support
performanceCards.desc: Latest HTTP/3 protocol support reduces latency and improves load performance on all connections.

performanceCards.title: Resource Isolation
performanceCards.desc: Your site's resources are isolated — other sites on the server can't affect your performance.

api::wordpress-hosting-page.wordpress-ho.managedTitle: We Handle the Technical Side So You Don't Have To
api::wordpress-hosting-page.wordpress-ho.managedSubtitle: Fully managed WordPress means zero maintenance headaches.

managedFeatures.title: Automatic WordPress Updates
managedFeatures.desc: Core WordPress, themes, and plugin updates managed automatically with compatibility checks.

managedFeatures.title: Daily Backups & Restore
managedFeatures.desc: Automated daily backups with 30-day retention. Restore your entire site with a single click.

managedFeatures.title: Security Scanning & Hardening
managedFeatures.desc: Proactive malware scanning, firewall rules, and brute-force protection keep your site safe.

managedFeatures.title: 24/7 Performance Monitoring
managedFeatures.desc: Continuous monitoring with instant alerts and auto-healing for any detected performance issues.

api::wordpress-hosting-page.wordpress-ho.whyChooseTitle: Why Thousands of WordPress Sites Run on ICSDC
api::wordpress-hosting-page.wordpress-ho.whyChooseSubtitle: Purpose-built WordPress infrastructure with the support to match.

whyChooseCards.title: WordPress-Optimized Servers
whyChooseCards.desc: Every server is tuned specifically for WordPress — PHP-FPM, optimized my.cnf, and OPcache configured perfectly.

whyChooseCards.title: Pre-Installed Essential Plugins
whyChooseCards.desc: Security, caching, and backup plugins pre-configured on install — start building immediately.

whyChooseCards.title: WooCommerce Ready
whyChooseCards.desc: All plans support WooCommerce with payment gateway integration and eCommerce performance optimization.

whyChooseCards.title: WordPress Multisite Support
whyChooseCards.desc: Run multiple WordPress sites from a single installation with full multisite network support.

whyChooseCards.title: PHP 8.x & Latest Stack
whyChooseCards.desc: Latest PHP 8.x with configurable versions, MariaDB 10.x, and full developer stack access.

whyChooseCards.title: WordPress Expert Support 24/7
whyChooseCards.desc: Support team with deep WordPress knowledge — themes, plugins, WooCommerce, and performance tuning.

api::wordpress-hosting-page.wordpress-ho.faqContactDesc:
Our WordPress specialists are available 24/7 to help with setup, migration, performance, and troubleshooting.

📞 +91 98109 58857

faq.question: How do I install WordPress on ICSDC hosting?
faq.answer: ICSDC WordPress Hosting includes a one-click WordPress installer in your control panel. Your WordPress site will be ready in under 5 minutes with no technical knowledge required.

faq.question: Can I migrate my existing WordPress site to ICSDC?
faq.answer: Yes. ICSDC provides free WordPress migration assistance. Our team migrates your entire site including files, database, themes, and plugins with zero downtime.

faq.question: Does ICSDC WordPress Hosting support WooCommerce?
faq.answer: Yes, all plans fully support WooCommerce. Our servers are optimized for eCommerce workloads with dedicated resources, Redis caching, and secure payment gateway support.

faq.question: What backups are included and how do I restore?
faq.answer: All plans include automated daily backups stored for 30 days. You can restore your entire site or individual files with a single click from your control panel, anytime.

faq.question: Is the SSL certificate really free?
faq.answer: Yes. Every ICSDC WordPress Hosting plan includes a free Let's Encrypt SSL certificate that auto-renews. HTTPS is configured automatically during setup.

faq.question: Can I run multiple WordPress sites on one plan?
faq.answer: The Business plan supports up to 5 WordPress sites, and the Pro plan supports unlimited sites — all managed from a single control panel with individual resources per site.

ctaBand2.title: Build Your WordPress Site on the Best Platform
ctaBand2.description: Fast, secure, and managed WordPress hosting — starting at ₹99/month.

testimonials.name: Kavitha Rajan
testimonials.quote: My WordPress site loads in under 1.5 seconds now. Before ICSDC it was 5+ seconds. The difference is incredible and my Google rankings jumped too.

testimonials.name: Ramesh Patel
testimonials.quote: Migrated my WooCommerce store from a slow host to ICSDC. Sales went up 40% within a month just because of faster page loads. Best investment I made.

testimonials.name: Divya Krishnan
testimonials.quote: Managing 20+ client WordPress sites on ICSDC. The staging environment and daily backups save us hours every week. Support is fantastic too.
